segment.source: Renders a compact card with heading, rich-text description, and an embedded TYPO3 callback form where visitors leave their phone number to be called back. Use it for: 'we call you' sections, phone-first contact offers, sales or support hotline alternatives, lead capture where a call is the next step. Prefer 'Booking Form' when a concrete appointment slot is requested, 'Contact Form Block' for general written inquiries.
